caption: The video appears to be captured by a security camera, labeled as "Cam 04," and shows a nighttime scene outside a building with a corrugated metal roof. The timestamp indicates it is late at night on May 13, 2022. The area is dimly lit, primarily illuminated by a bright light source on the right side of the frame. In the sequence, a person or object moves across the scene from left to right, creating a brief flash of light that reflects off the ground. This movement suggests the presence of an individual or vehicle passing through the area. The surroundings include various objects such as a ladder leaning against a wall, some hanging items, and what seems to be a small structure or container on the right. The overall atmosphere is quiet and still, with the exception of the momentary movement.
